header.title: GBV Referral Services
header.subtitle: Kakamega & Vihiga Counties
emergency.title: In immediate danger?
emergency.body: Call 999 (police) or 1195 (GBV helpline) immediately. If you cannot talk, text a trusted person or visit the nearest police station.
pathway.title: The formal GBV referral pathway:
pathway.body: Medical attention at nearest health facility → Report to nearest police station → Psychosocial support → Prosecution → Reintegration into community.
empty.title: No services found
empty.subtitle: Try changing your filters
categories.healthDesc: Medical treatment, HIV PEP, evidence collection
categories.shelterDesc: Temporary safe shelter for at-risk survivors
categories.legalDesc: Pro bono lawyers and justice support
